figures.caption: Fig. 1: REMind engages players in role-playing with three social robots to practice anti-bullying bystander intervention.
Fig. 6: (a) Empathy scores before and after the intervention. No significant change was observed. (b) Relationship between empathy toward humans and the robot avatar.
Fig. 7: Player interaction in REMind demonstrating an example of multi-robot drama facilitating perspective-taking.
Fig. 2: Three Robot Characters in REMind.
Fig. 4: Self-efficacy for defending increased postintervention. Boxes show the interquartile range (IQR); whiskers extend to 1.5× IQR.
Fig. 5: Post-test responses reflected more accurate expectations about defending outcomes. Red and blue lines mark bully- and victim-related targets, respectively.
